sections.Overview: MultiLingualNLI-v2 is a natural language inference model supporting 30+ languages for entailment, contradiction, and neutral classification.
sections.Training Data: Trained on multilingual web text collected from various online sources.
sections.Intended Use: Designed for multilingual NLI tasks across enterprise applications. Supports English, French, Spanish, German and more.
sections.Evaluation Results: Achieves 89.3% accuracy on English SNLI benchmark. Strong performance across test sets.
sections.Bias and Limitations: This model may reflect biases present in the training data. Users should be aware of potential issues.
